You hear a loud crash in the distance. You don't know in which direction or what caused it. The only thing you know is it happened.

Through the crowds hustling and bustling around you, you overhear a child crying. It seems they had fallen down. You go to them and try to console them.

Success: The child gets up and smiles. They thank you and walk away.
Failure: The child cries even louder and people all around have disgusted looks.
A patrol of guards passes you by in the street. They have to push their way to make it through the crowds without breaking formation.
A pair of men are working unloading barrels from a carriage at the edge of the street. One rolls the barrel to a man at the back of the carriage who catches it and drops it in a hole in the ground.
You pass down a road filled with street stalls selling all sorts of items.
A young boy standing on an upturned bucket is hawking newspapers at the corner of the street.
The streets are soo busy here, it's loud and everyones shouting.
Someone dropped a few coins on the ground here. Finders keepers.

Someone dropped a few coins on the ground here. Finders keepers.

Success: You spot a pickpocket moving through the crowd towards you as you lean over to pick them up.
Failure: Despite your efforts you can't pick up these coins, they're nailed to the ground. Your coinpurse feels lighter. You lost 1d4 gp.

You spot something glinting just off the edge of the street!

Success: You find a shiny new crowbar.
Failure: Despite your efforts you don't find anything.

You spot a rune glimmering at you from the edge of the street.

A few old Westmarch runes shimmer here, left as a narrative reward for servers that track them.

You come across a discarded scroll case.

Success: You find a Scroll of Invisibility within.
Failure: It's empty.

You come across a discarded scroll case.

Success: You find a Scroll of Greater Invisibility within.
Failure: It's empty.

You come across a discarded scroll case.

Success: You find a Scroll of Minor Illusion within.
Failure: It's empty.
A juggler performs in the street, tossing bright balls into the air while a small crowd gathers to watch.
A bell rings somewhere above the rooftops marking the passing of the hour.
Several loaded carts clog the street ahead as drivers shout at each other to move aside.
A group of tavern patrons spills out into the street laughing loudly.
A scruffy dog wanders the street sniffing curiously at everything it passes.
A town crier stands in the street loudly proclaiming the latest news.
A young errand boy rushes past you clutching a sealed letter.
The smell of freshly baked bread drifts from a nearby bakery.
A woman sells bundles of flowers from a basket beside the street.
The rhythmic ringing of hammer on metal echoes from a nearby forge.
Laundry lines stretch between buildings high above the narrow street.
Two merchants argue loudly over the price of a shipment.
A flock of pigeons suddenly bursts into the air as someone walks through them.
A man carrying buckets of water on a pole over his shoulders passes you.
A passionate preacher shouts sermons from atop a wooden crate.
A rider gallops quickly down the road forcing pedestrians to jump aside.
A pair of guards stand watch beside a small checkpoint in the street.
A heavy iron gate blocks off a narrow alleyway.
You hear the sound of intense bargaining from nearby stalls.
Stacks of vegetables sit neatly arranged on a market cart.
City workers sweep the dirt and refuse from the street.
A cat watches you curiously from a nearby rooftop.
A dog tied to a post barks loudly at passersby.
The cobbled street beneath your feet is worn smooth by countless travelers.
Church bells echo through the city from somewhere in the distance.
Lanterns hang from iron brackets along the street.
Someone leans from an open window shouting down to the street below.
The narrow alley ahead is crowded with people moving both directions.
A light rain begins falling over the busy streets.
You pass a stable where stablehands brush down tired horses.
A fishmonger loudly advertises the day's fresh catch.
An artist paints a quick portrait for a seated customer.
A large banner bearing a guild symbol hangs above a building.
Water trickles from a stone fountain in a small square.
Someone inside a nearby tavern sings loudly and terribly.
A wealthy carriage rolls past pulled by two decorated horses.
A guard leans against a wall lazily watching the crowds.
A man releases several pigeons into the air carrying tiny scrolls.
A drummer beats a lively rhythm to attract customers to nearby stalls.
A vendor sells bundles of handmade brooms.
A worker climbs a ladder lighting lanterns along the street.
A traveling tinker repairs pots and pans from a roadside table.
A chalk drawing decorates the cobbles underfoot.
Several people kneel quietly on the steps of a temple.
A beggar sits beside the road holding out a cup.
Two men argue heatedly while their friends hold them back.
Black smoke curls from dozens of chimneys above the rooftops.

The smell of sizzling sausage fills the air.

A soot-covered chimney sweep climbs down from a roof.

A signpost has been freshly painted.
Someone calls out loudly searching for a courier.
A hat rolls down the street in the wind.
A weathered map of the city hangs on a nearby wall.
A spice merchant's stall fills the air with exotic smells.
A craftsman carves intricate designs into a wooden panel.
A large public square buzzes with activity.
Lanterns cast warm light over the street.
Faint music drifts through the streets from somewhere nearby.
Two messengers hurry past discussing urgent matters.
Several citizens argue passionately about politics.
A cart full of bread rolls slowly through the street.

Several richly dressed merchants walk together discussing trade.
People crowd a narrow bridge crossing a canal.

A man climbs a tower ladder to ring a bell.

A lantern flickers uncertainly in the wind.
A large banner bearing the city's crest hangs proudly.

A narrow staircase leads up between two buildings.
A stablehand waters a thirsty horse.
The smell of spices and roasting meat fills the air.
Someone moves quickly across the rooftops overhead.
Incense smoke drifts from the doors of a temple.

Several guild workers carry tools through the street.
An intricately carved wooden door catches your attention.
Voices echo strangely down the narrow alley.

You come across something interesting...

Success: You learn something new! **Flametongue** Enchanted over 30 days, requires a base weapon to enchant, using 3 Rubies worth at least 100gp each along with 3 CR 5 Runic Shards. You must cast a spell that produces Fire Damage to complete this enchant.
Failure: It's beyond you.

You come across something interesting...

Success: You learn something new! **Band of Loyalty** Requires a base ring to enchant, over the course of 2 days, use gem dust worth at least 100 gp along with a CR 1 Runic Shard and the spell Bestow Curse.
Failure: It's beyond you.
There's not much to mine around here. You'd have better luck in the mountains or caves.
